@startuml skinparam sequenceDiagram participant User participant uFR Nano participant Raspberry Pi participant WebInterface participant PiPass participant DB actor User participant uFR Nano participant Raspberry Pi participant WebInterface participant PiPass participant DB alt [Tap First Example] 1 Tap 2 Polling Service 3 Ack Tap 4 User Lookup 5 Zero Results 6 Set user state to new.
Await WebInterface interaction. 7 Complete Registration Workflow else [Web Create] 8 Start Registration Workflow 9 Save registration.
Await next unassigned tap. 10 Ack Tap 11 User Lookup 12 Zero Results 13 Complete Registration 14 Save user details 15 Ack user registration 16 Confirm end note right of User New User Workflow end note @enduml
